languages.text: "Как повелите, Лорд-капитан. Я поделюсь с вашими солдатами знаниями, что могут постичь лишь {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Навис Нобилитэ{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Как повелите, Лорд-капитан. Я поделюсь с вашими солдатами знаниями, что могут постичь лишь {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Навис Нобилитэ{/g}".
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."
languages.original_text: "Как повелите, Лорд-капитан. Я поделюсь с вашими солдатами знаниями, что могут постичь лишь {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Навис Нобилитэ{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."
"As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your vassals the knowledge that only the Navis Nobilite can comprehend."
"As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your vassals the knowledge that only the Navis Nobilite can comprehend."
"As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."

languages.text: 「おっしゃる通りでございます、艦長様。{g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}ナヴィス・ノビリティ{/g}しか理解できない知識を、お殿様の臣下の方々に伝えます」
languages.original_text: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."

traits.locale_text: 「おっしゃる通りでございます、艦長様。ナヴィス・ノビリティしか理解できない知識を、お殿様の臣下の方々に伝えます」
「おっしゃる通りでございます、艦長様。{g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}ナヴィス・ノビリティ{/g}しか理解できない知識を、お殿様の臣下の方々に伝えます」

languages.text: «Como ordene, Lord Capitán. Compartiré con sus tropas el conocimiento que solo la {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} puede obtener».
languages.original_text: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."

traits.locale_text: «Como ordene, Lord Capitán. Compartiré con sus tropas el conocimiento que solo la {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} puede obtener».

languages.text: “如您所愿，舰长大人。我将向您的士兵分享只有{g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}导航宗族{/g}才能掌握的知识。”
languages.original_text: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."

traits.locale_text: “如您所愿，舰长大人。我将向您的士兵分享只有{g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}导航宗族{/g}才能掌握的知识。”

languages.text: "Wie Ihr befehlt, Lord Captain. Ich werde Eure Truppen Dinge lehren, die eigentlich dem {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} vorbehalten sind."
languages.original_text: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."

traits.locale_text: "Wie Ihr befehlt, Lord Captain. Ich werde Eure Truppen Dinge lehren, die eigentlich dem {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} vorbehalten sind."

languages.text: "Emrettiğin gibi Lord Kaptan. Sadece {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite'nin{/g} ulaşabildiği bilgileri birliklerle paylaşacağım."
languages.original_text: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."

traits.locale_text: "Emrettiğin gibi Lord Kaptan. Sadece {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite'nin{/g} ulaşabildiği bilgileri birliklerle paylaşacağım."

languages.text: « Entendu, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je partagerai avec vos vassaux les connaissances que seule la {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} peut obtenir. »
languages.original_text: "As you command, Lord Captain. I will share with your troops the knowledge that only the {g|Encyclopedia:NavisNobiliteGlossary}Navis Nobilite{/g} can achieve."
